title: Aurora, 99131, Palm Pals Santa Claus, 5In, Soft Toy, Red & White
features: From Aurora's highly popular Palm Pals Collection
Soft and extremely touchable soft toy made with high quality materials
Adorable Santa Claus cuddly toy that is filled with beans
Children will love this cute and hugely collectable character
description: This cute Santa Claus fits into the palm of your hand, he is full of beans which makes his super soft and cuddly. His body is a soft red plush material, wearing the classic Santa's outfits with white beard and Santa's hat. Palm Pals make great gifts for any occasion, whether it is for a birthday or as a general gift, everyone will fall in love with this adorable Elephant. Aurora World is an industry leader with over 40 years of experience in designing and manufacturing innovative and high quality plush products.
